THE LAST LIGHT
— a survival horror experience —
Find 3 keys and reach the exit before she finds you.
👁️ Stare at her to freeze her in place. Don't look away too long.
🚪 Hide in closets (press E) when she's close. She can't see you inside.
👀 She'll stalk you from the end of corridors — don't let her get comfortable.
🎲 Each run generates a NEW random maze — no two games are the same!
Difficulty
She is slow. Recommended for beginners.
Graphics Quality
High: full shadows, fog, film grain, glow. Best on desktop/newer phones.
Dialogue System
Scripted mode uses hand-written horror lines — works offline, zero setup. AI mode generates unique, unsettling taunts live using your own API key.
